channelName.title: Channel Name
channelName.description: The name of the channel to create. Channel names should lowercased with only letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores.
channelName.einstein:description: The name of the channel to create. Channel names should lowercased with only letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores.

teamId.title: Team ID
teamId.description: The Team ID (or Workspace ID) of the Slack workspace to create the Channel in.
teamId.einstein:description: The Team ID (or Workspace ID) of the Slack workspace to create the Channel in.

isPrivate.title: Is Private
isPrivate.description: If true, creates a private Slack channel. Otherwise creates a public channel.
isPrivate.einstein:description: If true, creates a private Slack channel. Otherwise creates a public channel.
